title: Valley of the Giant Oysters
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Valley of the Giant Oysters''' was an undersea region on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dac/Legends|Dac]] near the [[Seascape Mountains]]. As its name implies, the seabed of this region was populated with oversized [[Mollusk/Legends|mollusks]], luminescent fauna and varying species of eels as well as the sentient [[Whaladon/Legends|Whaladons]].

In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] forces staged their final assault against [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] newest [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]], the [[Death Star II/Legends|Death Star II]]. At the close of the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|battle]], the [[Space station/Legends|space station]] was destroyed, and several large fragments were shunted throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] from the force of the explosion. A large section of the station landed in the seas of Dac and settled down in the Valley of the Giant Oysters. A [[5 ABY/Legends|year later]], the self-proclaimed son of Emperor Palpatine, [[Trioculus]], ventured into the Valley on board a [[Whaladon-hunting submarine]] in search of the mysterious [[Glove of Darth Vader]]. He personally sifted through the wreckage, and recovered the glove. Shortly thereafter, Trioculus fought against Rebel heroes [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], and succeeded in forcing the Rebels to retreat from the undersea environment.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Glove of Darth Vader]]''
